ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., opener, middle-order, spinner) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spin) */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES player_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the captain of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "tournament" TEXT /* Tournament the match belongs to (e.g., World Cup, IPL, Big Bash) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team in the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the match was played */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the match was played */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second umpire */,
  "man_of_the_match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the man of the match */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Toss decision (e.g., bat, field) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_man_of_the_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type FOREIGN KEY ("match_type") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings played by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "avg" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "centuries" INTEGER /* Number of centuries scored by the player */,
  "half_centuries" INTEGER /* Number of half-centuries scored by the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Bowling economy rate of the player */,
  "best_bowling_innings" TEXT /* Best bowling figures in an innings */,
  "best_bowling_match" TEXT /* Best bowling figures in a match */,
  "five_wickets_innings" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls */,
  "ten_wickets_match" INTEGER /* Number of ten-wicket hauls */,
  "fielding_dismissals" INTEGER /* Number of fielding dismissals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player in the match */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player in the match */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Number of overs bowled by the player in the match */,
  "maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled by the player in the match */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Bowling economy rate of the player in the match */,
  "fielding_dismissals" INTEGER /* Number of fielding dismissals in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the tournament organizer */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the tournament */,
  "finals_date" TEXT /* Date of the finals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
